Gate(s): GATE-001; GATE-002; GATE-003; GATE-004; GATE-005; GATE-006
Audience role(s): Journey Lead; Oversight Lead; Knowledge Management Lead
Message purpose: Invite leaders to confirm the gate map, privacy boundaries and review order.
Template / message prompt: Schedule the gate-alignment meeting and ask attendees to review the six launch gates before the session.
Required links / attachments: Launch Gates; Gate Evidence Checklist; Leadership Review Schedule; Leadership Review Agenda; Leadership Review Outputs
Notes: Orientation only; record output in OUT-001 after the session.

Message purpose: Request owner-evidence review and nomination routing for required Journey roles.
Template / message prompt: Ask authorized reviewers to inspect private source evidence and route confirmed nominations without copying private names into shared surfaces.
Required links / attachments: Owner Evidence Review; Owner Appointment Routing; Owner Appointment and Authority Packet; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-001 to EVID-003
Notes: Real names belong only in approved fields after programme-owner confirmation.

Message purpose: Invite authority reviewers to confirm final decision rights and escalation boundaries.
Template / message prompt: Ask authority reviewers to review governance scope, escalation gaps and evidence routing before any authority fields are closed.
Required links / attachments: Governance Authority Review; DEC-003; Human Review HR-005; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-003 and EVID-008
Notes: This invite cannot approve HR-005 or owner appointments by itself.

Message purpose: Request safeguarding review decision and conditions.
Template / message prompt: Ask the reviewer to inspect the HR-001 packet and record the decision, authority, date and conditions in Human Review after sign-off.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-001; Human Review; HUMAN-REVIEW-REQUIRED.md; review packet folder
Notes: No safeguarding approval is implied by sending the request.

Message purpose: Request local legal review decision and conditions.
Template / message prompt: Ask the reviewer to inspect the HR-002 packet and record the decision, authority, date and conditions in Human Review after sign-off.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-002; country legal review checklist; Human Review; review packet folder
Notes: Do not treat template wording as legal advice.

Message purpose: Request medical-process review decision and conditions.
Template / message prompt: Ask the reviewer to inspect the HR-003 packet and record the decision, authority, date and conditions in Human Review after sign-off.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-003; medical readiness resources; Human Review; review packet folder
Notes: Do not add medical details or emergency contacts to this queue.

Message purpose: Request theology and programme-intent review decision.
Template / message prompt: Ask the reviewer to inspect the HR-004 packet and record the decision, authority, date and conditions in Human Review after sign-off.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-004; programme principles; Human Review; review packet folder
Notes: Theology outcomes remain open until qualified sign-off is recorded.

Message purpose: Request operating-authority review for final decision rights and publication authority.
Template / message prompt: Ask the authority reviewer to inspect HR-005, DEC-003 and DEC-006 dependencies before any gate or publication authority is closed.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-005; Governance Authority Review; DEC-003; DEC-006; publication checklist
Notes: Publication remains blocked while HR-005 is open.

Message purpose: Request girls programme content and fidelity review decision.
Template / message prompt: Ask the reviewer to inspect the HR-006 packet and record the decision, authority, date and conditions in Human Review after sign-off.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-006; girls programme pack; Human Review; review packet folder
Notes: Keep content conditions visible before any production website use.

Message purpose: Request copyright and reuse-boundary review decision.
Template / message prompt: Ask the reviewer to inspect copied, summarized and generated materials before anything is made public or broadly shared.
Required links / attachments: Human Review Routing HR-007; website publication checklist; Website Access Review; Human Review
Notes: No Alpha-owned assets should be copied into production without approval.

Message purpose: Invite pilot planners to define the smallest leadership-team pilot and readiness threshold.
Template / message prompt: Ask the team to confirm pilot scope, evidence categories and minimum preflight checks before the pilot is run.
Required links / attachments: Pilot Cycle Plan; Pilot Log; Event Readiness; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-011 to EVID-014
Notes: Pilot planning only; no participant/private data in the invite.

Message purpose: Request pilot debrief after real observations exist.
Template / message prompt: After the pilot has been run, ask leaders to categorize observations and route accepted changes or review-required issues.
Required links / attachments: Pilot Log; Pilot Cycle Plan PIL-004 to PIL-012; Leadership Review Outputs OUT-006
Notes: Blocked until a real pilot run produces non-sensitive observations.

Template / message prompt: Ask the data owner to approve minimum necessary fields, storage location and access group before replacing synthetic examples.
Required links / attachments: Restricted Data Replacement Checklist; DEC-005; TASK-014; privacy and data rules
Notes: Do not migrate restricted data from this queue.

Audience role(s): Programme owners; website lead; Oversight Lead
Template / message prompt: Ask decision-makers to compare leaders-only, partly public/protected and public/authenticated models, then record authority-approved conditions.
Required links / attachments: Website Access Review; Website Access Model Decision Brief; DEC-004; publication checklist
Notes: No production sharing or publishing is authorized by this invite.

Audience role(s): Knowledge Management Lead; Oversight Lead; website owner
Message purpose: Request publication prerequisite check and go/no-go review only after prerequisite approvals exist.
Template / message prompt: When access, authority, content and copyright approvals are recorded, schedule the final production go/no-go review.
Required links / attachments: Website publication checklist; DEC-004; DEC-006; HR-005; HR-007; Event Readiness
Notes: Do not send while GATE-005, HR-005, HR-007 or content-review conditions are open.

Message purpose: Send a short status digest of open actions, due dates and missing evidence.
Template / message prompt: Summarize Dashboard open counts, Launch Gates status and the next three communications needing action.

Notes: Keep the digest role-only and omit private contact details.
